description: Braintree account setup, credentials, SDK initialization, and client token generation

credentials.merchant_id: Braintree Merchant ID from Control Panel → Settings → API Keys
credentials.public_key: Braintree Public Key — used in server SDK initialization
credentials.private_key: Braintree Private Key — NEVER expose client-side

gateway_initialization.description: Create a BraintreeGateway instance with credentials — reuse across requests
gateway_initialization.pattern: gateway = new BraintreeGateway({ environment, merchantId, publicKey, privateKey })

client_token.description: Server generates a client token for the client-side SDK (Drop-in or Hosted Fields)

options.customerId: Optional — pass for returning customers to show vaulted payment methods

notes: Generate a new token for each checkout session
Do NOT cache client tokens across users
